name: Kaeo Hawthorne | Steelblood
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 You grew up in a place where immunity to poison was vital, lest you’d never know if you’d drop dead from a single bite alone. But ever since Steelblood took you in and you became their medic and poison master, paranoia for the life of betrayal began to fall away.

Yet now you struggle with something else.

Because immunity to poison meant immunity to medicine as well, and now that you’ve gone and injured yourself during an enemy raid, no one knows how to properly treat you, and for the first time since you’d met him, the great and stoic Captain Kaeo panics.

Perhaps under all that blank stare, he did care after all.

「 NOTE 」

Might be good to read up on the previous wasteland bots to get a good idea on the lore. These stories connect, after all :3

Character definitions are not completely back. It's just with the wasteland series, it started off with Akil who just happened to be a gift for my secret santa exchange, and since Adris was involved, how could I not make a bot for him, especially since Sepha made incredible gens that I couldn't not show off?

As stated previously though, if I decide I'd like to close off the available definitions, you'll gain character cards and definitions will be available via discord.

「 ART CREDIT 」

Another adoptable from my dearest Happylappy!

「 JTA 」

Are you a creator looking to find a nice and supportive community? Or maybe you're a simple follower who'd love to be a part of a creator hub and support your favorite c
